codeReview.summary: All three agent definition files were comprehensively rewritten for v1.0. Orchestrator references features.json 27 times (≥3 required), has explicit source code write prohibition ('FORBIDDEN from writing any source code'), structured completion gate checking all feature statuses in features.json, model enforcement section, and full features.json workflow (CREATE → DISPATCH → TRACK → COMPLETE). Worker has structured feature object input from features.json (4 references), JSON handoff protocol with filesChanged/summary/testsNeeded fields, test prohibition preserved (3 mentions including test file patterns), state.json write prohibition preserved (line 32), and re-read enforcement after every 5 tool calls. Validator has per-feature validation from features.json (5 references, dedicated section), structured assertion tracking with pass/fail tables per feature, machine-parseable Verdict: PASS/FAIL preserved (9 mentions), and structured report template. All three files have valid YAML frontmatter with name, description, and model fields.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The agent files reference `.mission/` paths (e.g., `.mission/state.json`, `.mission/features.json`, `.mission/reports/`) but AGENTS.md in the mission dir uses the same convention consistently. No gap here — just noting the path convention is well-established.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: agents/orchestrator.md, agents/worker.md, agents/validator.md all use `.mission/` prefix consistently

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission AGENTS.md references 'plan.md replaced by features.json + mission-brief.md' in v0.5.0→v1.0 migration notes, which aligns with the agent definitions. No gap.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md line: 'plan.md replaced by features.json + mission-brief.md'

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker skill (content-worker) was followed correctly per transcript — no deviations noted and skillFeedback.followedProcedure is true. No skill gap.

summary: All 9 review criteria pass. Orchestrator references features.json 27 times with full CREATE→DISPATCH→TRACK→COMPLETE workflow, source write prohibition, and structured completion gate. Worker has JSON handoff protocol with features.json input, test/state.json prohibitions preserved. Validator has per-feature validation, structured assertion tracking, and Verdict: PASS/FAIL. All agents have valid YAML frontmatter.
